creator: exploringlondon
caption:
This is the craziest ice cream shop in London and it’s back for its fifth year running! ad-pr This is The Ice Cream Project by @anyahindmarch and it’s an ice cream shop like no other, with the most weird and wonderful flavours. All handmade in small batches in Devon with the highest quality ingredients. 

Here’s the selection of the 15 flavours on offer this year:
🍊 Capri Sun Orange
⚫️ Kikkoman Soy Sauce
🧈 Lurpak Butter
🌽 Green Giant Sweetcorn 
🍪 McVitie’s Ginger Nuts Biscuits
🍫 Yazoo Chocolate Milkshake
🪥 Euthymol Original Toothpaste
☕️ Illy Coffee
🍓 Muller Corner Strawberry
🧅 Paxo Sage and Onion Stuffing
🟡 Aunt Bessie’s Golden Yorkshire Puddings
🅾️ OXO Beef Stock Cubes
♦️ Walker’s Shortbread Fingers
🍮 Tunnock’s Caramel Wafer
🧀 Mini Cheddars

Some of these might sound crazy but if you’re brave enough to try them, you may find that they are unexpectedly delicious 😉 Which would you try? And don’t miss their popular branded caps! 🧢

🗓️ Open from 5th June 2026 at 10am, for 10 weeks, until Sunday 16th August
⏰ Opening Hours: Monday-Saturday: 10am-6pm, Sunday: 12-5pm
💷 £4.50 for 1 scoop, £6.50 for 2 scoops, £8.50 for 3 scoops, £16 for a 500ml tub
📍 11 Pont Street, Anya Village, SW1X 9EH
